Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) determined to be final, as of the TAF creation date). The claims 
included in these files are active, final-action, non-voided, and non-denied claims1 (except for Illinois).2 The TAF claims 
files are available for four care settings: 

1. Inpatient (IP) 
2. Long-term care (LT) 
3. Other services (OT) 
4. Pharmacy (RX) 

For more information about the TAF claims files, reference the CCW T-MSIS Analytic Files (TAF) User Guide.
